popularStory.headline: A virtuous and Kind Ruler
popularStory.description: Saint Ferdinand was a virtuous and kind ruler, extending the faith of Catholicism throughout Spain and Moorish-occupied territories, and taking care of the poor and needy. He was especially devoted to …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León於1201年6月24日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉科拉萊斯 德爾 文培利亞斯 德 阿利巴時，他的父親Alfonso De León IX29歲，母親Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León21歲。他於1219年11月30日與Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年5月30日在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞享年50歲，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León于1201年6月24日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉科拉萊斯 德爾 文培利亞斯 德 阿利巴时，他的父亲Alfonso De León IX29岁，母亲Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León21岁。他于1219年11月30日与Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年5月30日在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞享年50岁，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: Fernando
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

variants.name: Fernán
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León was born on 24 June 1201, in Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Alfonso De León IX, was 29 and his mother, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, was 21. He married Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen on 30 November 1219, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 May 1252, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 50, and was buried in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León est né le 24 juin 1201, à Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Alfonso De León IX, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen le 30 novembre 1219, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 mai 1252, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León am 24. Juni 1201 in Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alfonso De León IX 29 und seine Mutter Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León 21. Er hat am 30. November 1219 in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Mai 1252 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien und wurde in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León è nato il il 24 giugno 1201 nel Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Alfonso De León IX, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen il 30 novembre 1219, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 maggio 1252, nel Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de Leónが1201年6月24日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンザモーアコラレス デル ヴィノペレアス ド アリバで生まれた時，父Alfonso De León IXは29歳，母Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de Leónは21歳であった。1219年11月30日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスでElisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年5月30日にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラセヴィラで50歳で死去し，スペインアンダルクiアセヴィラにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León,: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스 버고스

ko.lifeSummary: Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León(이)가 1201년 6월 24일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 자모라 코라일스 데 빈오 펠리스 데 아리바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alfonso De León IX(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1219년 11월 30일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 5월 30일 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León nasceu em 24 de junho de 1201, em Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Alfonso De León IX, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen em 30 de novembro de 1219, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de maio de 1252, em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León родился 24 июня 1201 г. в местности пелис де арриба, корреилесь дель вино, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Alfonso De León IX было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen 30 ноября 1219 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 мая 1252 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León nació el 24 de junio de 1201, en Peleas de Arriba, Corrales del Vino, Zamora, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Alfonso De León IX, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elisabeth of Hohenstaufen House of Hohenstaufen el 30 de noviembre de 1219, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1252, en Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Sevilla, Andalucía, España.
